news_list.title: Ministry of Domestic Trade and Cost of Living Kota Kinabalu cripples diesel diversion syndicate, nabs 2
news_list.summary:
Kota Kinabalu: The Ministry of Domestic Trade and Cost of Living (KPDN) Kota Kinabalu has crippled a subsidised diesel diversion syndicate following an Ops Tiris 4.0 raid at a petrol station in the city on Monday.

Sabah KPDN Director Shahril Nizam Shahidin said the operation was based on intelligence gathered by the Sabah Intelligence Unit, leading to the immediate deployment of enforcement officers to the location for swift and effective action.

Advertisement During the operation at approximately 12.05pm, he said, officers found two vehicles parked at two fuel pumps suspected of being involved in an organised diesel diversion scheme.

"Both vehicles were fitted with additional Intermediate Bulk Container (IBC) tanks with a capacity of 1,000 litres each, containing an estimated 800 litres of diesel per vehicle," he said, Tuesday.

SPONSORED CONTENT Cosmobeauté expands into Borneo with debut festival in KK Cosmobeauté Malaysia and beautyexpo will expand into East Malaysia with the launch of the Cosmobeauté Malaysia Borneo Festival 2026 at the Sabah International Convention Centre (SICC) from May 25 to 26. Read more "Investigations revealed the syndicate pumped diesel into the vehicle's original tank, then transferred it via a modified hose and electric pump into IBC tanks," he added.

Shahril Nizam said two individuals in their 30s were ordered to produce documents related to controlled goods, stock books and receipts for diesel purchases and sales, but failed to do so.

Advertisement He said the total value of seizures for both cases amounted to RM22,745, including an Isuzu Trooper, a Toyota Lite Ace van, IBC tanks, an electric pump, rubber hoses and diesel.

The case is being investigated under Section 21 of the Control of Supplies Act 1961 for possession of controlled goods with the intent to commit an offence.

Advertisement "KPDN stresses that any form of subsidised controlled goods diversion is a serious offence that harms the public interest and national economy, and will not be tolerated. Firm, uncompromising action will be taken against all violators.

"All parties, particularly petrol station owners, must fully comply with the law and government directives to ensure that subsidies are distributed fairly, transparently, and effectively," he said.

Shahril Nizam also urged the public to act as KPDN's eyes and ears by providing accurate information on any controlled goods diversion activities, enabling swift and effective enforcement action.

news_list.title: US Ambassador on India Ties: "Incredible Footing," Big Announcements Ahead
news_list.summary:
Speaking to DD India, Gor's remarks followed a recent phone call between Prime Minister Narendra Modi and US President Donald Trump on West Asia developments and the India-US partnership.

Gor confirmed the leaders have spoken multiple times this year, not all publicly disclosed. "They've actually spoken several more times this year... not every conversation obviously becomes public. But they did just get off the phone in the last hour," he said.

Without divulging specific details, the US envoy said the American President regularly updates the Prime Minister on key global developments. "As the war in the Middle East right now is ongoing, the President wanted to give the Prime Minister an update along with some other big-ticket items that are happening in Washington between our relationship," he stated.

Gor declined to detail trade discussions. However, hinted at significant developments ahead. "It focused on several big-ticket items. I don't want to get into it... But what I will share with your viewers is I just came back from Washington, where I met with the entire cabinet... so we do have some big ticket items that will be announced over the next few days, over the next few weeks," he said.

He further underlined the strength of bilateral ties, stating that the relationship is currently on an "incredible footing."

The envoy also confirmed that US Secretary of State Marco Rubio is scheduled to visit India next month, marking his first visit to the country. Gor said preparations are underway for a ministerial-level Quad meeting in India.

"We're looking forward to hosting a ministerial-level Quad meeting in India. This will be the Secretary's first visit to the country, and he is keen to visit not just Delhi but other places as well. India is vitally important to us and an incredible partner. The President also shares a strong relationship with your Prime Minister," Gor told DD News.

Meanwhile, Prime Minister Narendra Modi, on Tuesday, received a call from US President Trump during which the two leaders discussed the security situation in West Asia and stressed the importance of keeping the Strait of Hormuz open and secure.

PM Modi wrote in a post on X that they reviewed progress achieved in our bilateral cooperation in various sectors.

He said the two countries are committed to further strengthening their Comprehensive Global Strategic Partnership in all areas.

"Received a call from my friend, President Donald Trump. We reviewed the substantial progress achieved in our bilateral cooperation in various sectors. We are committed to further strengthening our Comprehensive Global Strategic Partnership in all areas," he said.

"We also discussed the situation in West Asia and stressed the importance of keeping the Strait of Hormuz open and secure," he added.

news_list.title: Korea expands direct air travel baggage transfer program to 3 U.S. airports
news_list.summary:
Korea has added two more U.S. airports to its program allowing travelers from Incheon International Airport to connect to a transfer flight in the United States without having to claim and recheck baggage for the flight to their final destination, the Ministry of Land, Infrastructure and Transport said Wednesday.

The International Remote Baggage Screening program had been available only for passengers transferring at Atlanta, according to the Transport Ministry.

The program will be extended to two international airports in Detroit, Michigan, and Minneapolis, Minnesota, starting Thursday, it said.

The expansion was made in cooperation with the U.S. Transportation Security Administration and Customs and Border Protection, with the two sides also agreeing to further improve transfer procedures in the future.

Under the system, X-ray images of baggage checked at Incheon are transmitted in advance to the United States, allowing security agents there to screen luggage before the aircraft arrives. If no issues are detected, baggage is transferred directly to connecting flights.

The program was first introduced at Hartsfield-Jackson Atlanta International Airport in August of last year.

With the expanded service, transit passengers on Incheon-Detroit and Incheon-Minneapolis routes will be able to board connecting flights without reclaiming baggage, reducing transfer times by at least 20 minutes, the ministry said.

Yonhap

news_list.title: India Travel 2026: Grand Continent Hotels Ramps Up Pilgrimage Tourism With New Property in Rameshwaram Amid Spiritual Travel Surge - Travel And Tour World
news_list.summary:
Riding the rising wave of spiritual and pilgrimage tourism, Grand Continent Hotels has opened a new hotel in Rameshwaram -- a major religious destination on Pamban Island -- as part of its ambitious expansion in India's year‑round faith travel market. The new four‑star property marks the chain's 31st hotel, and reflects growing confidence that spiritual travel will continue to be a stable driver of tourism demand in India throughout 2026 and beyond. Grand Continent's latest hotel is designed to appeal to devotees, cultural travelers and international visitors alike, offering comfortable accommodation and services tailored to pilgrimage needs.

The Rameshwaram hotel features 48 guestrooms and includes a vegetarian restaurant catering to Jain and Satvik dietary preferences -- a thoughtful touch that aligns with the expectations of many spiritual travelers and pilgrims visiting the region. According to company officials, these dietary offerings are part of its broader strategy to provide culturally sensitive hospitality that resonates with India's diverse visitor base.

India's spiritual tourism sector has been attracting increased attention from travel brands and investors, with analysts noting that pilgrimage travel -- travel oriented around sacred sites, religious festivals and cultural heritage -- has grown into a major tourism segment in recent years. Demand for travel to spiritual destinations like Rameshwaram, Varanasi, Ayodhya and Somnath remains strong throughout the year, as both domestic and global travelers seek meaningful cultural and religious experiences.

The government's emphasis on promoting religious circuits such as the Ramayana Circuit, Char Dham Yatra and others has also helped raise awareness of India's spiritual travel offerings to global markets, positioning the country as one of the world's top destinations for religious and cultural tourism. Official tourism data show that millions of visitors are drawn annually to India's sacred sites, contributing significantly to local economies and travel‑related employment. (See Incredible India - Ministry of Tourism travel planning resources)

Grand Continent Hotels' founder and managing director, Ramesh Shiva, has said that South India in particular remains a strong growth market for spiritual travel infrastructure. The new Rameshwaram property joins a portfolio of hotels that are strategically located near pilgrimage hubs, enabling guests to easily access sacred sites and religious experiences that are central to their visit.

Rameshwaram, located on Pamban Island in Tamil Nadu, is one of the most revered pilgrimage destinations in India, known for its temples, spiritual rituals and connection to the Hindu epic Ramayana. The town sees a steady influx of pilgrims and cultural tourists year‑round, helping sustain a travel ecosystem supported by local guides, hospitality services, and transport networks.

Travelers come to visit Ramanathaswamy Temple, one of the Char Dham sites, and to perform holy rites in accordance with religious traditions. For international visitors, Rameshwaram offers not just a spiritual journey but a chance to explore heritage sites and traditional Indian culture as part of a broader travel itinerary that might include nearby Madurai and Kanyakumari. Tourism planners report that pilgrimage traffic to South Indian sacred cities has been rising steadily, a trend that hotel developers such as Grand Continent are now capitalizing on

Grand Continent isn't stopping at Rameshwaram. The hotel group is actively developing properties in other high‑demand religious destinations, including:

The group's footprint now spans more than 17 Indian cities with a total of over 1,850 rooms, and it reported revenues of approximately Rs 75 crore in the 2024‑25 financial year and Rs 57 crore in the first half of 2025‑26. These figures point to strong business performance tied to travel demand, particularly in mid‑scale and budget segments that serve pilgrims and tourists alike.

Travel industry analysts note that spiritual and religious tourism is becoming a cornerstone of India's overall tourism strategy. It combines heritage exploration, cultural immersion and faith‑based journeys, creating varied experiences that appeal to multiple traveler segments -- from devoted pilgrims to international cultural tourists. Pilgrimage sites like Rameshwaram, Varanasi and Somnath are also increasingly featured in tourism promotional campaigns, further boosting their profile among travelers planning trips in 2026 and beyond.

According to research reports, destinations tied to religious festivals and pilgrimage circuits see significant increases in traveler interest during key event periods -- a pattern that also benefits hotels, transport services, tour operators and local businesses alike. The predictable nature of pilgrimage travel offers year‑round occupancy, contrasting with seasonal patterns that often affect leisure beach destinations.

Visitors planning to travel to Rameshwaram in 2026 can expect:

Pilgrims from across India and abroad are increasingly combining spiritual travel with heritage, nature and food experiences, diversifying how they engage with India's travel offerings.

As 2026 progresses, hospitality brands like Grand Continent Hotels are expected to continue investing in pilgrimage‑oriented properties, helping sustain infrastructure growth that supports India's spiritual tourism boom. This trend highlights how cultural and religious travel remains a stable engine of tourism demand, and how hotel developers can play a key role in elevating visitor experiences by expanding lodging, services and amenities near sacred sites.

For travellers seeking deep cultural connection and meaningful exploration in India, the rise of dedicated hospitality offerings near sacred destinations signals new opportunities for enriched pilgrimage travel in 2026 and beyond.

themes.name: 印度-美國關係深化與潛在公告
themes.insight: 印度與美國之間的關係處於「令人難以置信的良好基礎」，美國大使預告未來幾天或幾週內將有重要公告，並提及兩國領導人之間的頻繁溝通，特別是關於西亞局勢的討論。
evidence: US Ambassador on India Ties: "Incredible Footing," Big Announcements Ahead
Speaking to DD India, Gor's remarks followed a recent phone call between Prime Minister Narendra Modi and US President Donald Trump on West Asia developments and the India-US partnership.
PM Modi wrote in a post on X that they reviewed progress achieved in our bilateral cooperation in various sectors.

"Received a call from my friend, President Donald Trump. We reviewed the substantial progress achieved in our bilateral cooperation in various sectors. We are committed to further strengthening our Comprehensive Global Strategic Partnership in all areas."

themes.name: 印度朝聖旅遊市場增長與酒店擴張
themes.insight: 印度朝聖旅遊市場正在蓬勃發展，Grand Continent Hotels 正在大力擴張，新增了位於拉梅斯瓦拉姆（Rameshwaram）的新酒店。此趨勢反映了靈性旅行作為旅遊業穩定驅動力的潛力，政府對宗教旅遊線路的推廣也進一步提升了印度的吸引力。
evidence: India Travel 2026: Grand Continent Hotels Ramps Up Pilgrimage Tourism With New Property in Rameshwaram Amid Spiritual Travel Surge - Travel And Tour World

Riding the rising wave of spiritual and pilgrimage tourism, Grand Continent Hotels has opened a new hotel in Rameshwaram -- a major religious destination on Pamban Island -- as part of its ambitious expansion in India's year‑round faith travel market.

The government's emphasis on promoting religious circuits such as the Ramayana Circuit, Char Dham Yatra and others has also helped raise awareness of India's spiritual travel offerings to global markets, positioning the country as one of the world's top destinations for religious and cultural tourism.

As 2026 progresses, hospitality brands like Grand Continent Hotels are expected to continue investing in pilgrimage-oriented properties, helping sustain infrastructure growth that supports India's spiritual tourism boom.

Travel industry analysts note that spiritual and religious tourism is becoming a cornerstone of India's overall tourism strategy. It combines heritage exploration, cultural immersion and faith‑based journeys, creating varied experiences that appeal to multiple traveler segments -- from devoted pilgrims to international cultural tourists. Pilgrimage sites like Rameshwaram, Varanasi and Somnath are also increasingly featured in tourism promotional campaigns, further boosting their profile among travelers planning trips in 2026 and beyond.

According to research reports, destinations tied to religious festivals and pilgrimage circuits see significant increases in traveler interest during key event periods -- a pattern that also benefits hotels, transport services, tour operators and local businesses alike. The predictable nature of pilgrimage travel offers year‑round occupancy, contrasting with seasonal patterns that often affect leisure beach destinations.

Visitors planning to travel to Rameshwaram in 2026 can expect:

Pilgrims from across India and abroad are increasingly combining spiritual travel with heritage, nature and food experiences, diversifying how they engage with India's travel offerings.

As 2026 progresses, hospitality brands like Grand Continent Hotels are expected to continue investing in pilgrimage‑oriented properties, helping sustain infrastructure growth that supports India's spiritual tourism boom. This trend highlights how cultural and religious travel remains a stable engine of tourism demand, and how hotel developers can play a key role in elevating visitor experiences by expanding lodging, services and amenities near sacred sites.

For travellers seeking deep cultural connection and meaningful exploration in India, the rise of dedicated hospitality offerings near sacred destinations signals new opportunities for enriched pilgrimage travel in 2026 and beyond.

evidence: 2.BOJ升息機率增，限制日圓走貶

topics.topic: 印度-美國關係深化與潛在公告
topics.summary: 印度與美國之間的關係處於「令人難以置信的良好基礎」，美國大使預告未來幾天或幾週內將有重要公告，並提及兩國領導人之間的頻繁溝通，特別是關於西亞局勢的討論。
evidence: US Ambassador on India Ties: "Incredible Footing," Big Announcements Ahead
Speaking to DD India, Gor's remarks followed a recent phone call between Prime Minister Narendra Modi and US President Donald Trump on West Asia developments and the India-US partnership.
PM Modi wrote in a post on X that they reviewed progress achieved in our bilateral cooperation in various sectors.

"Received a call from my friend, President Donald Trump. We reviewed the substantial progress achieved in our bilateral cooperation in various sectors. We are committed to further strengthening our Comprehensive Global Strategic Partnership in all areas."

topics.topic: 印度朝聖旅遊市場增長與酒店擴張
topics.summary: 印度朝聖旅遊市場正在蓬勃發展，Grand Continent Hotels 正在大力擴張，新增了位於拉梅斯瓦拉姆（Rameshwaram）的新酒店。此趨勢反映了靈性旅行作為旅遊業穩定驅動力的潛力，政府對宗教旅遊線路的推廣也進一步提升了印度的吸引力。
evidence: India Travel 2026: Grand Continent Hotels Ramps Up Pilgrimage Tourism With New Property in Rameshwaram Amid Spiritual Travel Surge - Travel And Tour World

Riding the rising wave of spiritual and pilgrimage tourism, Grand Continent Hotels has opened a new hotel in Rameshwaram -- a major religious destination on Pamban Island -- as part of its ambitious expansion in India's year‑round faith travel market.

The government's emphasis on promoting religious circuits such as the Ramayana Circuit, Char Dham Yatra and others has also helped raise awareness of India's spiritual travel offerings to global markets, positioning the country as one of the world's top destinations for religious and cultural tourism.

As 2026 progresses, hospitality brands like Grand Continent Hotels are expected to continue investing in pilgrimage-oriented properties, helping sustain infrastructure growth that supports India's spiritual tourism boom.

ai_analysis.full_text:
【今日結論】
今日台股預期將開高，受惠於美股科技股強勁表現與台積電 ADR 的顯著溢價。然而，東北亞市場的拉回以及夜盤期貨的漲幅可能僅為短期技術性反彈，需提防高檔震盪。資金流向與技術面支撐將是今日盤面能否延續強勢的關鍵。
【新聞驅動】
盤面上最主要的兩大新聞動能為：一、美伊停火談判露出曙光，搭配美國 3 月 PPI 低於預期，緩解了地緣政治風險與通膨擔憂。二、Meta 與博通簽署 AI 晶片合作協議，為 AI 供應鏈注入活水，並帶動博通盤後上漲。這兩大利多共同推升了昨日美股普遍上漲，特別是科技類股。
【國際與台股】
昨夜美股普遍走強，S&P 500 逼近歷史新高，那斯達克指數也創下連漲紀錄。費城半導體指數上漲 2.04%，台積電 ADR 更大漲 2.79%，溢價達 17.39%，顯示市場對台積電的追捧。然而，日經指數和 KOSPI 今日呈現下跌，與美股普漲走勢有所背離，可能對台股開盤造成一定的上方壓力。目前 CNN 恐懼貪婪指數處於中性 47，暗示市場情緒尚未完全樂觀。
【KOL與情緒】
從籌碼數據來看，儘管「流動性雷達」顯示短期流動性穩健，但「體制雷達」顯示資金正從風險資產流向美股 QQQ，而比特幣對 QQQ 的資金流向為負，暗示資金回流美股跡象。散戶情緒方面，雖然「Social Pulse」顯示「行政院國家發展基金」、「g7」、「聯亞」等特定題材正在上升，但因「social_pulse」健康度為 MISSING，市場情緒面的參考依據不足，散戶動態難以精確判讀，需謹慎看待。
【操作含意】
操作上，今日台股開盤預期會受到台積電 ADR 溢價及美股科技股帶動而走高。但需留意東北亞市場的拉回以及夜盤期貨可能只是技術性反彈，盤中需密切關注量價關係，避免追高。輝達 (NVDA) 和美光 (MU) 均在 3 月 2 日基準線之上，顯示 AI 相關族群的強勢格局有望延續，但部分資金流向的警示信號，提醒操作上應保持謹慎，留意獲利了結的賣壓。

chart_orchestration.overall_summary: 今日台股預期將開高，受惠於美股科技股強勁表現與台積電 ADR 的顯著溢價。盤面主要受美伊談判進展與美國 PPI 低於預期，緩解地緣政治風險與通膨擔憂；以及 Meta 與博通簽署 AI 晶片合作協議，為 AI 供應鏈注入活水的兩大新聞動能驅動。昨夜美股普遍走強，S&P 500、Nasdaq、費半及台積電 ADR 均有顯著上漲。然需提防東北亞市場拉回以及夜盤期貨漲幅可能僅為短期技術性反彈。資金流向與技術面支撐將是今日盤面能否延續強勢的關鍵。市場情緒顯示為貪婪，需留意過度樂觀跡象。科技主題熱度集中在宏觀經濟與地緣政治相關議題。

chart_gap_suggestions.why_needed: 把衝突事件數、致死數與未來風險預測可視化，讓地緣政治對市場的影響更直觀。
chart_gap_suggestions.evidence: 專案已有 ACLED service，但目前未做成可視化圖表。

chart_gap_suggestions.why_needed: 把 PTT 與 Dcard 的熱門討論、看多看空比與主題熱度做成圖，補足市場情緒面。
chart_gap_suggestions.evidence: 現有 trend_pulse 與社群抓取已能提供底層資料。

chart_gap_suggestions.why_needed: 晨報常聚焦 AI / 半導體 / 科技權值，將科技主題與新聞來源拆開呈現會更清楚。
chart_gap_suggestions.evidence: 目前科技內容散落在新聞主題與 AI 分析中，尚未獨立成圖。
